name: publish_photo
description: Publish a photo to the authenticated user's Instagram feed. This is a two-step process: first create a media container with the image URL, then publish it. Requires the 'instagram_content_publish' scope.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The Instagram user ID of the publishing account.

parameters.name: image_url
parameters.description: A publicly accessible URL to the image file (JPEG format recommended).

parameters.name: caption
parameters.description: The caption text for the photo post. Supports hashtags and mentions.

parameters.name: location_id
parameters.description: The Facebook Places ID to tag a location on the post.
